name: HiLo check Cashing
description_short: Hi-Lo Check Cashing is a check-cashing service located in Commerce City, Colorado, offering basic financial transaction services to local residents and businesses.
description_long: Hi-Lo Check Cashing operates as a check-cashing business serving the Commerce City, Colorado area. The company is registered as a member of the Commerce City Chamber of Commerce and maintains a Centennial Club membership status, indicating established local business presence and community involvement. The business has been listed in local business directories and maintains a physical location at 7280 Monaco Street in Commerce City. These are essential financial services for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to funds without maintaining traditional bank accounts. The company operates during standard business hours and can be reached by phone at (303) 286-3982. The company's membership in the Commerce City Chamber of Commerce suggests commitment to local business standards and community engagement. The Centennial Club designation indicates the business has maintained standing within the chamber and participates in local commerce activities. Hi-Lo Check Cashing operates within Colorado's check-cashing regulatory framework, which governs licensing and fee structures for these services. Potential customers should contact the business directly to understand exact charges, processing times, and accepted check types. Like all check-cashing operations, Hi-Lo Check Cashing serves an important role for those without bank accounts but represents a costlier alternative to traditional banking.
pros: Established local business with Commerce City Chamber of Commerce membership
Centennial Club status indicating long-standing community presence
Physical location in Commerce City with direct phone contact available
Serves the local Commerce City area with accessible storefront location
Participates in local business community and professional networks
Provides quick cash conversion for those without bank accounts
cons: No detailed fee schedule or pricing information available on listing
Website provides minimal information about specific services offered
No information about service hours or holiday closures
No clarity on which check types are accepted or processing requirements
Limited online presence beyond chamber of commerce directory listing
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals in Commerce City needing immediate cash
Local residents requiring check-cashing services without bank accounts
Small business owners needing quick cash conversion in the Commerce City area
diagnosis: Hi-Lo Check Cashing is best for unbanked and underbanked residents in Commerce City, Colorado who need immediate cash conversion without a traditional bank account. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing and service details—customers must call directly to understand fees, which typically make check-cashing more expensive than bank alternatives.
meta_description: Hi-Lo Check Cashing is a check-cashing service in Commerce City, Colorado serving local residents and businesses.
